reviews.review_msg: Cécile was very helpful and accessible, and strongly encouraged in-class participation. Her syllabus was also very confusing and I found myself doing a ton of research outside of class to even stay afloat with the dense material we were learning week by week.

He's a very interesting TA. I was highly motivated to attend his class. it was a very friendly environment. one feels very comfortable to ask questions. I definitely recommend him. he's a very easy going instructor.

omgggg!!!he is the best teacher ive ever seen!!he is funny he makes stuffs interesting to learn for students..well prepared for class and you will fall in love with him after you attended one of his class!!highly recommended!!he is cute
Catherine is an awesome lady. She is not good at technical issues, so better help her to use some laptop or other things.

incredible prof! really caring and flexible, and was always available if you had any questions or if you needed any help with the material. you can tell she really wants you to succeed not just in this class but also in your studies. had really great lectures, was engaging and so sweet! merci beaucoup !
